name: nyora
summary: The manga reader SDK for Python — build a manga/manhwa/manhua reader with 390 working sources across 40 languages through one typed API — fully self-contained (bundles & auto-launches its own local parser engine, no cloud required) or pointed at any server. A programmatic Tachiyomi/Mihon/Kotatsu alternative, with a CLI and terminal reader (TUI).
author: Md Hasan Raza
